rows.asset_name: ESTEE LAUDER CO INC CL A (EL)
ESTEE LAUDER CO INC CL A (EL)

uncertainties.read: TRANSPOSED but FULLY LABELED Schedule B grid ('Areco Schedule B'): each COLUMN is one transaction (6 columns), with left-hand labels for owner (SP/DC/JT), Security Name, Ticker, Transaction, Amount of Transaction buckets A-L (+Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000), Type of Transaction (Purchase/Sale/Partial Sale/Exchange), Capital Gain Exceeded $200, and Transaction Date. Unlike pp.118-121 the bucket labels are present so amount and tx_type are resolved. X marks read from dark bars. Capital Gain row empty for all columns -> cap_gain_over_200=false. No transaction column carries an EIF marker (EIF box sits only over the label header). Bucket text transcribed verbatim ('$1-$1,000', '$1,001-$15,000').
uncertainties.note: 'Areco' = filer entity/trust header for this Schedule B sheet
